textByHash.01b8ce0037663bc1addc2fc5455576d5fceb1765: Well, I can get you another piece but you're going to have to pay for my time... 200 coins I'll want.
textByHash.024d5ca504600f80ee60a79f01e76e61ce4359b3: Ugh, it's still raw! You can't serve me that. Take it away!
textByHash.0ae28376ca17b6a91654f120cd96f1d4cc667dfd: This is a great map, thanks for letting me have a copy! I'm excited to explore more of the jungle.
textByHash.12b265a5b76dc1c4c13b11410141c15fc98c4e40: Apparently he was on a mission to map the area. How foolish is that?
textByHash.12bfd40bc508c2719f7455594a9b69313afdb3c0: Sorry, but I have no use for that.
textByHash.18b499df20e9722a7fc5caa748f69114b46dc4a1: Not really. Just be careful - there's a lot of weird stuff going on in there lately.
textByHash.1a67be4df20b726f4a4c4caec66235f076d235b8: Hang on a minute... there's no need to get so angry. Here's that red mahogany you wanted.
textByHash.2a80b539fe48b4958a38f74d133566ae755c13ef: You're supposed to take the axe to Captain Shanks and ask him to take it Brian's Axes in Port Sarim. I'm sure he won't mind.
textByHash.34c4e4be8c7711a334b1ae0debfee8318b4d0e0a: Sorry friend, I know you did me a small favour, but I have to earn a crust too!
textByHash.3eb40d7aa86b30fbeb73deecc8d3a043cbcb2eaf: Oh yes, I've met loads of them! Lovely lot. I haven't seen many about recently, though.
textByHash.3ee0a0286a3a9ca8db56078e23f7b57d7c75b347: Best of luck though... Guthix knows, you'll need it.
textByHash.4735587378cbb24b57d57fdf39b5fdbfee522256: Oh, yes, well I can get you a piece but I need my axe sharpening... Do me a small favour would you? Take it to Captain Shanks for me.
textByHash.50e1c24548767df9e77893b566ad5eb50875ec75: Oh. Oops. Sorry if I sounded rude, it just seems like a really bad idea.
textByHash.57127fac20b591524776a41991b135fa861b7585: Sorry, I don't do that kind of thing any more. You should go and talk to Pirate Jackie in Brimhaven instead.
textByHash.5b60def3709e6bb44010377ecef5821122961ae4: Well, suit yourself, I can always find other customers.
textByHash.5ebdb58e2add519d7b65da00e6098c8266d2e491: Well, yes, actually. It's my favourite! I've been training with that axe since I started my profession as a jungle forester.
textByHash.6115a178232e294aab4b5175f665c3a98de414dc: I wish I did! But I just have the one, and I've grown fond of it. Besides, I might need it if I ever get lost in the jungle.
textByHash.6e679d067a1a46075093f754ada8c5e02b7f138b: Okay, thanks for getting my axe sharpened for me!
textByHash.7046bc6d0ab6f00a51be3748cb12620f3a8d14ac: If you swing it above your head it makes a funny noise. It's great for attracting people's attention!
textByHash.7b1914ace4d3fe68b097dc7681d661070dcca339: Yeah, you've been a while... I mean, I could have just gone and done it myself! It probably wouldn't have taken so long.
textByHash.7cdf313d995c45107c36fd2a129443e59d6a5e7e: That's a Bullroarer. Swing it above your head and it'll make a funny noise. It's great for attracting people's attention!
textByHash.8313630012664ff0b94a99f852137f4f22f1804a: He's the Captain of the 'Lady of the Waves', he goes to Port Sarim quite often. Could you ask the Captain to drop the axe in at Brian's Axes the next time he's in Port Sarim? I'm sure he won't mind!
textByHash.846a5647d20eb0df3e6c572b4d47884780ae4385: Er... maybe? I'll just be on my way...
textByHash.860c9b055ba4e9304d53f640778e65ec44bb08e7: I mean it's a noble calling. Lots of people around here could use a proper map to navigate with. But, you know... there's something not quite right about that jungle.
textByHash.8bd6705225f62795553cc397debda07aed62370b: This is an impressive map! I'm amazed, it's just great! Do you mind if I make a copy of it? I'll give you my Bullroarer in return.
textByHash.966a62933c97c79711be028c81c40a9e5fcd6c8c: I'm a forester, and I specialise in exotic woods. I haven't gone into the Kharazi myself, but I've found some interesting tree specimens out here.
textByHash.98141896138a3b268ee6a7e7cab534888bb2a9c9: Go on then. Forestry is hungry work.
textByHash.a2e26f336e00d23f207e03daf5935f1fc256df4b: Hello friend. You're a long way from Lumbridge!
textByHash.a863fe3ee1819bc1607b1e22c40b13bb6d8f69a0: If you're looking to say hello, you'll need a Bullroarer. If you swing it above your head it makes a loud noise - that should attract someone's attention.
textByHash.bc364d779999b83643e5203cb610da8fd858aef8: Well, I don't recommend just walking in! The last guy I saw try that barely escaped with his life.
textByHash.bde9415bb2ec82afbdf578d9a217cec769133d66: Wow, you're really not from around here are you? The Captain is to the west of here, follow the northern edge of the Kharazi Jungle, he's usually on board his ship!
textByHash.be21999756d2fc88bac454829cb6fbf6c245a489: If you do find a safe path into the jungle, do come and let me know. I'd love to have a nose around in there.
textByHash.be23b931283c1ed13e8c236319800a2f69772ee0: Great, here you go! If you could ask the Captain to pop it into Brian's Axes for resharpening when he's next in Port Sarim, that would be really helpful.
textByHash.cb141fddf5586592f9cbc10aa7db0e2e595b3fa4: Take the blunt axe to Captain Shanks and ask him to take it to Brian's Axes.
textByHash.cff4a1c44c82ca92a2ce775916924f1def657c2a: I know. Another jungle forester found it and returned it to me. Here, take it again and this time don't lose it!
textByHash.e34c4087c55050512b40baae2096d99c36f6e1c0: I gave you my blunt axe to give to Captain Shanks. I was hoping that he would be able to pop it into Brian's Axes in Port Sarim to get it sharpened. I do hope nothing bad has happened to my axe, I am very partial
textByHash.f1dd39d1e56b50003046cb4fd99228eeec28ec08: You'll have better luck getting someone's attention if you use it in the jungle.
textByHash.fa510c2e9a54be7ac810ed9bffc1460e75664b9b: Hmm, maybe. Tell you what, you show me something interesting and I'll see if it's worth my Bullroarer. How about that?
